subject: English
chapter: The Beam of Light That Lit the Path for Women in Indian Science

activities_projects.title: Discussion on Women in Science
activities_projects.objective: Introduce students to the role of women scientists in India
steps: Read the introduction of the chapter
Discuss famous women scientists mentioned in the text
Write down what inspired you about their achievements
Share your ideas with classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the importance of women’s contributions to science

activities_projects.title: Biography Exploration Activity
activities_projects.objective: Understand the life and achievements of Bibha Chowdhuri
steps: Read the biography section carefully
List the major achievements of Bibha Chowdhuri
Write a short note on her contribution to Indian science
Discuss your findings with classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn about the contributions of a pioneering Indian woman scientist
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy and clarity of the written summary (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Timeline Creation Activity
activities_projects.objective: Understand important events in the life of Bibha Chowdhuri
steps: Identify key events from Bibha Chowdhuri’s life
Arrange them in chronological order
Create a timeline on chart paper
Present the timeline in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn to organise information chronologically
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy and creativity of the timeline (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Character Traits Identification
activities_projects.objective: Identify qualities that helped Bibha Chowdhuri succeed
steps: Read the chapter again carefully
List the qualities of Bibha Chowdhuri such as determination and curiosity
Find examples from the text supporting these qualities
Discuss the traits with classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the values needed for success in science
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity of explanation and examples (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Group Discussion on Gender Equality in Science
activities_projects.objective: Encourage awareness about gender equality in scientific fields
steps: Form groups of four students
Discuss the challenges faced by women in science
Share ideas on how society can support women scientists
Present your group's opinions to the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop awareness about gender equality in education and careers
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of ideas and teamwork (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary Development Activity
activities_projects.objective: Improve understanding of scientific and academic vocabulary
steps: Identify difficult words from the chapter
Write their meanings in your notebook
Use the words in meaningful sentences
Share sentences with classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve vocabulary and language skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct meanings and sentence usage (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Research Activity on Women Scientists
activities_projects.objective: Encourage independent research on other women scientists
steps: Choose a woman scientist from India or the world
Research her life and scientific contributions
Write a short report
Present your findings in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn research and presentation skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of research and presentation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Poster Making Activity
activities_projects.objective: Promote awareness of women’s achievements in science
steps: Design a poster about Bibha Chowdhuri or another woman scientist
Include pictures and key achievements
Write an inspiring message
Display the poster in the classroom
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students express creativity and appreciation for scientists
activities_projects.evaluation: Creativity and clarity of information (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Short Speech Activity
steps: Prepare a short speech about Bibha Chowdhuri
Include her achievements and importance in science
Practice speaking clearly
Deliver the speech in front of the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve public speaking and confidence

activities_projects.title: Reflective Writing Activity
activities_projects.objective: Encourage students to reflect on inspiration from the chapter
steps: Think about what you learned from the chapter
Write a paragraph about how Bibha Chowdhuri inspires young scientists
Explain why women’s participation in science is important
Submit the writing to the teacher
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop reflective and analytical writing skills
